To provide that communication, we need a device in the middle called a transit gateway to be able to connect all of these VPCs together. column84: [mid] communication between all of our different VPCs. If you need connectivity to these VPCs from the outside, you may need to add additional security in the form of a VPN connection. But there may be times when you want to make your application instances available to anyone on the internet. column82: [early] The end of you. I told you, Kobol. I see. So the two of you are looking to become the Wizard King, are you? Not surprising, given that you are magic knights. column80: hero:Uther:mid:fuzzy:the->uther:0.985,"[intro] The Eye of the Midnight Sun. Go on, tell us their name. The traitor... ...is the Purple Orcus captain... ...Galder Poizot. Ridiculous!
column82: [early] He's the Purple Orcus captain, Galdor Poizot. Ridiculous! What are you trying to say? These two are terrorists guilty of attacking the royal capital itself. You would have to be crazy to believe a word out of their mouths. I've never given anyone cause to doubt my loyalty to this kingdom. Well, that isn't exactly true. I have heard a few distasteful rumors regarding you. Is that all, Charlotte? I've heard a great deal more than a few. No way! Are you guys serious? Sure are. There are rumors all over the place.
column84: [mid] No way! Are you guys serious? Sure are. There are rumors all over the damn place. It's crazy. And now it seems they weren't baseless after all. I always knew that you were up to something sneaky, but I never imagined even you would stoop to this level. This isn't funny! There's obviously been a mistake! Yes! column80: hero:Thrall:mid:fuzzy:ll->thrall:0.985,"[intro] Gul'dan Versus! What brings you here, stranger? This is a far cry from our home.
column82: [early] This is a far cry from our usual skirmishing, especially when you consider those who appear to be in command. Yes, Logus, Rox, and Iakos. Three of the eight shining generals. The eight shining generals? I've never heard of them before. They're the eighth most powerful people in the whole Diamond Kingdom. You might think of them as being kind of like our Magic Knight captains. That's super not good.
column84: [mid] Magic Knight captains. That's super not good. Worse, Kite is the linchpin of our border defense. If we lose it, we'll be wide open to a Diamond Kingdom invasion. I have not been accepted by another clan. The time has come. This battle could alter the course of the Diamond Kingdom's history. A big battle? It's been far too long. How very exciting. We'll crush these Clover Kingdom weaklings and take their precious border town. The little maggots don't stand a chance. Our spies informed us that the Clover Kingdom had been worn down by the continued conflict with the Eye of the Midnight Sun, and that border security was thin on the ground as a result. It seems they were correct. We just need to take control of Kite and then we'll have the upper hand. Let's get started already. This is fun.",safe_for_format,Jaina,Arthas Menethil,99,verified,capture_plus_ocr,"° ay
